title: Release of Deposit in Escrow. The deposit in escrow of a LMA that
content: 36 voluntarily surrenders its license or has not renewed its license shall be released upon 37 submission of the following documents: 38 39 a. Copy of the duly executed/signed escrow agreement; 40 41 b. Bank certification of the status of escrow deposit; 42 43 c. Certificate of No Pending Case from the NLRC and NCMB; 44 45 d. Clearance from the Adjudication Bureau of the Department; 46 47 e. Decision to withdraw the escrow deposit through written notice of the Single 48 Proprietor duly received by the DTI or notarized Partnership or Board Resolution 49 duly received by the SEC, indicating the name of the person to process and receive 50 the check representing the escrow deposit; 51 52 f. Surety bond equivalent to the amount of the escrow deposit valid for six (6) years 53 from expiration of the license, if applicable; and 54 55 g. Other documentary requirements as may be prescribed by the Department or 56 required by applicable law. 57 58
